---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the pipeline, analysis, or documentation
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like added or changed?**
A clear description of the proposed feature or change.

**Motivation**
Why is this useful? Does it affect the paper's methodology, or is it purely
tooling/reproducibility (e.g. new indicator, new figure, better error message)?

**Additional context**
Any relevant links, data sources, or prior art.
